$comment: SAMPLE PolyRobin Rationale Card — illustrative output, not a live recommendation. One JSON file is written to ~/.polyrobin/audit/ for every recommendation, whether it results in a trade or a stand-down.

market.question: Will Fighter A win tonight's main event?
market.resolution_criteria: Official result declared by the promotion; a win by KO/TKO, submission, or decision resolves YES. A draw or no-contest resolves NO.

ambiguity_assessment.notes: Single authoritative result source, binary outcome, clear draw/no-contest handling. No manipulability concerns.

independent_estimate.method: Weighted blend of source signals below; resolution is clean so no ambiguity discount applied. Estimate is formed independently of the market price.

inputs.signal: Fighter A: 4-1 last 5, favorable stylistic matchup (wrestling vs. orthodox striker); Fighter B coming off 9-month layoff.
Beat-writer consensus mildly favors A; no reported injury or weight-cut issues for either camp.
Line drifted 0.54 -> 0.52 on modest YES-side volume in the last 2h; no sharp reversal.

edge_math.slippage_notes: $20 order is far smaller than ~$120k book depth, so slippage is negligible (~0). Polymarket trading fee ~0.
edge_math.notes: Net EV clears the +4% gate comfortably; size still kept conservative.

size_math.notes: 1/4-Kelly (0.031 x $1000 = ~$31), volatility-trimmed to ~$29.7, then rounded DOWN to a conservative $20 -- well inside the 10% per-market cap.

gates.name: Max exposure per category
gates.detail: Sports category exposure 2.0% after this bet.

gates.name: Conviction + edge threshold
gates.detail: Conviction 68 and net EV ~+11.5%; both clear.

gates.name: Confirmation requirement
gates.detail: Awaiting explicit user 'yes' before any execution. Cannot be bypassed.

recommended_instruction: Place $20 YES on "Will Fighter A win tonight's main event?" on Polymarket, at or better than 0.52, pending user confirmation.

execution.reason: Awaiting user confirmation (gate 5). No funds have moved.

disclaimer: Decision-support only, not financial advice. Prediction markets can lose 100% of staked capital. PolyRobin never custodies funds or keys; execution runs through BankrBot from the user's own wallet on explicit confirmation.
